name: Sweet-Sour Franks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine first four ingredients in removable liner; mix well to break up jelly chunks.
2. Place liner in base.
3. Cover and cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes to soften jelly and blend sauce ingredients.
4. Cut hot dogs into bite-size pieces and add them.
5. Add pineapple.
6. Cover and cook on high for 2 hours, or low for 4 hours.
7. Set control to low to maintain temperature while serving.
